item.text: I’ll use the email tools only for this thread, then pull customer/account and policy context as needed before creating the appropriate action with evidence.
The thread is a renewal pricing question from Maya at Acme. I’m checking CRM and pricing policy now so the reply does not infer discount terms.

arguments.query: renewal pricing discount carries over Pro plan
renewal pricing discount carries over Pro plan

item.text: CRM confirms Acme Health is an existing Pro customer renewing on August 30, 2026, but I do not yet have a fact about the discount itself. I’m widening the KB search and checking the company record before deciding whether to draft an answer or escalate.

Policy says existing customer renewal and discount questions must go to the account owner. Since Maya’s account owner is Jordan, I’m forwarding the thread with the CRM and policy facts attached as evidence.

arguments.note: Maya Chen at Acme Health asked whether their current Pro plan discount carries over at renewal or whether they should expect different renewal pricing.
